_comment: Phase 3d-iii-a — Cloudflare Access policy gating the ENTIRE operator surface (auth off the client, spec 1.1 AUTH pin). Applied by apply_access_and_tunnel.ps1. NO secret here: the API token is pasted at apply time, never stored in this file. Replace <SLOT> values with the operator's real identifiers at apply time; the apply-script substitutes them.

self_hosted_app.name: SignalDelta Discovery (operator surface)
self_hosted_app._note_domain: EXISTING permanent DNS record — do NOT create/modify/delete it. This app attaches Access to the existing hostname only.

policy.name: operator-only
policy._note: Deny-by-default: only the operator identity is admitted; every other caller is rejected at the tunnel before reaching any /sm/* endpoint. The proxy additionally requires the injected Cf-Access-Authenticated-User-Email header on every endpoint.
